export const personal = {
  name: "Bikash Kattel",
  nickname: "Vicky",
  tagline: "CSIT Student & Developer",
  location: "Kathmandu, Nepal",
  university: "Tribhuvan University",
  degree: "B.Sc. CSIT",
  year: " 2022 ",
  email: "bikashkattel7@gmail.com",
  github: "https://github.com/vickyjii774",
  linkedin: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/bikash-kattel-6a7748314/",
  youtube: "www.youtube.com/@bikashkattel",

  bio: [
    "Hey! I'm Bikash (Vicky), a CSIT Student who loves turning ideas into impact. I enjoy the journey — from brainstorming creative solutions to  shipping something.",
       "Currently, I am focused on web development, continuously refining my skills, and building elegant, user-friendly applications that make an impact."
,
  ],
  
  interests: ["Explorer","Developing business strategies and innovative concept", "Sports Enthusiast", "Building Meaningful Connection" ],
};

export const skills = [
  { name: "C / C++",       level: 70, category: "Languages" },

];

// Status: "done" | "wip" | "planned"
